subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-26 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The progress of any things occurs within its own station.  When one considers the mineral, vegetable, animal, and human stations
subcodes.first_line_orig: ترقی هر شیئی در صقع آن است در مراتب جماد و نبات و حیوان و انسان چون ملاحظه شود
subcodes.subjects: @progress only takes place within its own degree, @station of the Manifestation of God, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence
